creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
The email address on your Bugzilla account chuck@tuffli.net does not match the 
email you assigned to MAINTAINER ctuffli@gmail.com.  Please make sure they are in 
sync, so that future bug reports can be automatically assigned to you.

Let me know when you've updated your Bugzilla account email, or if you want to
use chuck@tuffli.net instead.

P.S.: Your patch has Windows line endings.  How did that happen?
